name: HMS Kirkella (FY 174)
events: 15 Nov 1941 HMS H 44 (Lt. J.S. Stevens, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Lough Foyle with HMS Kirkella (T/Lt. M.J. Rowlands, RNVR). (1)
2 Jun 1942 HMS H 28 (Lt. J.S. Bridger, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Lough Foyle with HMS Kirkella (T/Lt. M.J. Rowlands, RNVR) and aircraft. (2)

10 Apr 1943 Around 1530 B/10, HMS Tally-Ho (Lt.Cdr. L.W.A. Bennington, DSO, DSC, RN) departed her builders yard at Barrow for Holy Loch. She was escorted by HMS Kirkella (T/Lt. M.J. Rowlands, RNVR). (3)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
